title: festuca duriuscula subsp. gracilior
intro: Festuca duriuscula subsp. gracilior, also known as slender hard fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Festuca and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula subsp. gracilior include its potential to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications for various health conditions.
